name: tile
description: A selectable card with radio (single) or checkbox (multi) semantics, toggled by click or keyboard

meta.name: Tile
meta.description: A selectable card with radio (single) or checkbox (multi) semantics, toggled by click or keyboard

props.name: value
props.description: Identifies this tile within a group.

props.name: defaultSelected
props.description: Initial selected state for uncontrolled use.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Called with this tile's value whenever it is toggled on (or off for multi).

props.name: selectable
props.description: Single = radio semantics (toggle on); multi = checkbox semantics (toggle on/off).

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, disables the control and removes it from the tab order.

props.name: asChild
props.description: When true, renders the child element as the root via Slot, merging props (polymorphic rendering).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Single-select group
examples.code: Starter Pro

examples.title: Multi-select with icon
examples.code:
<Tile value="notifications" selectable="multi" icon={<BellIcon />} defaultSelected>
  Email notifications
</Tile>
examples.description: Multi tiles toggle on and off like a checkbox.

whenToUse: A visually rich, clickable choice card in a single- or multi-select group
Plan/option pickers where each option needs an icon and supporting content
A larger touch target than a plain radio or checkbox
whenNotToUse: A simple inline boolean — use Checkbox or Toggle
A dense list of text-only options — use RadioGroup or a Select

antiPatterns.bad: <Tile value="on">Enable</Tile> // used as a standalone on/off control
antiPatterns.why: Single (radio) tiles cannot be unselected by clicking; use multi for toggleable behavior

related.name: RadioCard
related.reason: RadioCard wraps a native input in a group; Tile is a standalone ARIA radio/checkbox

related.name: CheckboxCard
related.reason: Use CheckboxCard when native checkbox form semantics are required

intent.a11yRationale: Exposes role="radio" (single) or role="checkbox" (multi) with aria-checked reflecting selection, is focusable, and toggles on Space/Enter. aria-disabled and a -1 tabindex remove disabled tiles from interaction.

flexibility.note: asChild renders onto a custom element via Slot
